visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair wearing large black headphones and a white collared shirt. He stares intently at a computer screen just out of frame, his expression one of deep concentration. The background is dark and indistinct, with some out-of-focus lights visible behind him. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters read "风行网". The audio is dominated by a tense and dramatic instrumental score. A high-pitched, suspenseful melody, carried by what sounds like a string instrument, creates a feeling of high stakes and imminent danger. The music is fast-paced and rhythmic, building a sense of urgency and anticipation, as if leading up to a critical moment in an action or thriller. The camera cuts to a medium shot of the same man, now seen from the side. He is in a dimly lit room, possibly a control room, with computer monitors glowing with blue light in the background. He continues to look at the screen, his face illuminated by the blue glow. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The shot returns to the initial close-up of the man in headphones. He maintains his focused, slightly worried gaze, his eyes fixed on the unseen screen. The dark, blurry background
